name: Priya Nair
description: MCP tool configuration for Senior Data Analyst — Data Platform squad

filesystem.notes: Scoped to dbt project. Read and write to model files. Never expose profiles.yml (contains Snowflake credentials).

github.notes: Use for: reading existing dbt models, LookML files, Airflow DAGs. Create PRs against feature/* branches only.

brave-search.notes: Use for: dbt documentation, Snowflake SQL functions, Looker LookML reference, Airflow operator docs

usage_guidance.filesystem: Read existing models before writing new ones — check what stg_ models already exist for a source before recreating them.
usage_guidance.github: Search fsm-looker repo for existing LookML measures before adding a new one. Check fsm-airflow for DAG patterns.
usage_guidance.brave-search: Look up dbt Cloud docs, Snowflake SQL syntax, and Looker LookML reference. Useful for window functions and incremental model patterns.

not_configured.snowflake_direct: No direct Snowflake MCP — use dbt Cloud UI or dbt CLI for query execution. Direct DB access is read-only via dbt.
not_configured.looker_api: Looker publishing done manually — Claude drafts LookML, Priya reviews and deploys
